pet_notes: An original cute upright baby gecko named Kiko with a slim narrow torso, long elegant neck-to-belly line, compact hips, short splayed limbs with rounded adhesive toe pads, a long low tail extending sideways and gently curving, a softly wedge-shaped head wider than the neck but not circular, huge glossy warm dark eyes, tiny nostrils, a subtle confident smile, cream throat and belly, exactly three pale cheek freckles per side, and a few subtle darker speckles across crown and back. Kiko changes body color and expression by state: idle mint-green calm; running-right and running-left aqua determined; waving sunny yellow cheerful; jumping coral-orange thrilled; failed soft blue sad; waiting warm amber expectant; running teal focused; review lavender skeptical. Preserve the same gecko anatomy, face, freckles, cream belly, speckles, proportions, toe pads, long tail, and identity in every frame; never make Kiko round, chubby, blob-like, frog-like, or toddler-shaped.
style_notes: Polished kawaii 3D-sticker hybrid with softly modeled rounded forms, restrained fine reptile texture, crisp dark-plum edges, simple cel-like lighting, no cast shadows, and a compact whole-body silhouette readable at 192x208.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: Polished kawaii 3D-sticker hybrid with softly modeled rounded forms, restrained fine reptile texture, crisp dark-plum edges, simple cel-like lighting, no cast shadows, and a compact whole-body silhouette readable at 192x208..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
